item.title: DeFi United Moves to Restore rsETH Backing After $292M Exploit | DeFi United outlines a recovery plan to restore rsETH backing after the $292M Kelp bridge... https://Blockchain.News/news/defi-united-rseth-recovery-plan-292m-exploit
item.description:
Original title: DeFi United Moves to Restore rsETH Backing After $292M Exploit Summary: DeFi United outlines a recovery plan to restore rsETH backing after the $292M Kelp bridge exploit. Key players include Aave, Consensys, and Arbitrum DAO. Article text: DeFi United outlines a recovery plan to restore rsETH backing after the $292M Kelp bridge exploit. Key players include Aave, Consensys, and Arbitrum DAO.
DeFi United, a recovery coalition tied to Aave (AAVE), has detailed its plan to restore backing for rsETH after the April 18 exploit of Kelp DAO’s cross-chain bridge. The attack released 116,500 rsETH—worth $292 million at the time—without proper burning on the source chain, creating a backing shortfall. The group’s technical roadmap proposes converting committed ETH into rsETH and depositing it into the affected bridge lockbox, enabling the bridge to resume operations.
The Kelp exploit, attributed to North Korea’s Lazarus Group, exploited a security flaw in Kelp's single-verifier bridge design. The drained rsETH was later used as collateral on platforms like Aave and Compound, generating systemic bad debt. As of now, seven attacker-linked addresses still hold 107,000 rsETH-backed positions.
To recover these funds, DeFi United plans to adjust the rsETH oracle price temporarily, liquidate exploiter positions in a controlled manner, and redeem the rsETH for ETH. The recovered ETH will be used to clear deficits in affected protocols. However, the plan’s success hinges on governance approvals, DAO votes, and the attacker not interfering with the liquidation process.
Key Ethereum ecosystem players have stepped in to support the recovery effort. Consensys and its co-founder Joe Lubin have committed up to 30,000 ETH, while Sharplink, an Ethereum-focused treasury firm, is helping structure the plan. Aave Labs has also requested the Arbitrum DAO to release 30,765 ETH frozen by the Arbitrum Security Council after the exploit.
As of April 28, DeFi United has raised $302.26 million (132,706 ETH) in commitments, though some funds are still awaiting DAO votes for final execution. The initiative has unified the DeFi ecosystem, with multiple protocols coordinating to mitigate the exploit’s fallout.
rsETH, an Ethereum staking derivative, currently trades at $2,327.75, down 1.67% over the past 24 hours. The exploit not only exposed vulnerabilities in Kelp's bridge infrastructure but also underscored broader DeFi risks tied to cross-chain interoperability. Security flaws in bridge designs—specifically Kelp’s controversial 1-of-1 verifier configuration—have reignited debates around decentralization and security standards in DeFi.
Given the scale of the exploit, the recovery plan’s successful execution could signal the resilience of DeFi protocols in addressing systemic threats. However, the reliance on governance approvals and multisig coordination highlights the operational challenges of decentralized recovery efforts. The outcome will likely influence future bridge designs and risk management strategies across the industry.
For traders and stakers, the restoration of rsETH backing is critical to restoring confidence in its ecosystem. Any delays or disruptions in the recovery plan could further impact rsETH’s price and liquidity, making this a pivotal moment for the token’s market stability.
All eyes will be on DeFi United’s next steps, especially as DAO votes and governance processes unfold in the coming weeks. Success or failure here could set a precedent for how DeFi handles large-scale exploits in the future.

item.title: HKMA Warns of Fraudulent Tokens Claiming Stablecoin Links | The HKMA has warned against tokens falsely linked to licensed stablecoin issuers HSBC and... https://Blockchain.News/news/hkma-fraudulent-stablecoin-warning
item.description:
Original title: HKMA Warns of Fraudulent Tokens Claiming Stablecoin Links Summary: The HKMA has warned against tokens falsely linked to licensed stablecoin issuers HSBC and Standard Chartered. Article text: The HKMA has warned against tokens falsely linked to licensed stablecoin issuers HSBC and Standard Chartered.
The Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) issued a warning on April 28, 2026, cautioning the public about tokens falsely claiming association with licensed stablecoin issuers, HSBC and Standard Chartered. The tokens in question, bearing the tickers “HKDAP” and “HSBC,” are not authorized or issued by either institution, according to official statements from both entities.
This alert comes just weeks after the HKMA granted the first two stablecoin licenses under Hong Kong’s new regulatory framework to HSBC and Standard Chartered on April 10, 2026. Despite this milestone in regulating the local stablecoin market, fraudulent actors appear to be exploiting the news to mislead investors.
Under Hong Kong’s Stablecoins Ordinance, effective since August 2025, only licensed entities are permitted to issue stablecoins. These issuers must meet stringent requirements, including maintaining HK$25 million in paid-up share capital and fully backing all issued stablecoins with high-quality, liquid assets. This framework was designed to ensure stability and investor protection in the stablecoin market, but it also underscores the risks of unregulated tokens masquerading as legitimate offerings.
Neither HSBC nor Standard Chartered has issued any regulated stablecoins to date, the HKMA clarified. The authority urged the public to verify claims through official channels and conduct transactions only via regulated platforms to avoid falling victim to scams. The HKMA also reminded investors of their right to redeem licensed stablecoins at par value under the current regulatory regime, which does not extend to fraudulent or unregulated tokens.
Hong Kong’s stablecoin market has been under increasing scrutiny as the city positions itself as a hub for digital assets. The Stablecoins Ordinance is part of a broader effort to provide legal clarity while encouraging innovation. In parallel, the Securities and Futures Commission (SFC) is piloting the trading of tokenized funds on licensed crypto exchanges, signaling a push toward integrating traditional finance with blockchain-based solutions.
For investors, this latest warning serves as a reminder to exercise caution, particularly in a market where regulatory regimes are still taking root. Fraudulent tokens like “HKDAP” and “HSBC” may lure unsuspecting individuals with false claims of legitimacy, but the HKMA’s robust licensing framework provides a clear line between authorized issuers and bad actors. Staying informed and adhering to regulated channels is key to navigating Hong Kong’s evolving stablecoin environment.
As the market matures, the HKMA’s proactive stance highlights its commitment to investor protection and market integrity. With no official launch date for licensed stablecoins yet, traders should remain vigilant for further announcements from HSBC, Standard Chartered, and the HKMA.

item.title: AAVE Price Prediction: $110 Target Within 15 Days as Whales Load Up | Smart money positioning at 59.6% long while AAVE consolidates near $97.62 mid-range. Tech... https://Blockchain.News/news/20260428-price-prediction-target-aave-110-within-15-days-as-whales
item.description:
Original title: AAVE Price Prediction: $110 Target Within 15 Days as Whales Load Up Summary: Smart money positioning at 59.6% long while AAVE consolidates near $97.62 mid-range. Technical setup suggests 12-15% upside move targeting $110 resistance with 65% probability over next two weeks. Article text: Smart money positioning at 59.6% long while AAVE consolidates near $97.62 mid-range. Technical setup suggests 12-15% upside move targeting $110 resistance with 65% probability over next two weeks.
The momentum picture for AAVE is painting a classic accumulation pattern that seasoned traders recognize immediately. With RSI sitting dead center at 49.18 and MACD histogram flatlining at zero, we're witnessing that critical moment where directional conviction typically emerges. The Bollinger Band positioning at 0.50 confirms AAVE is trading exactly at the statistical mean - neither oversold nor overbought.
Price action is hugging the 20-day SMA at $97.51, creating a coiling effect that historically precedes explosive moves. The $7.49 daily ATR suggests we should expect roughly 7-8% moves when this consolidation breaks, making the immediate resistance at $100.00 and strong resistance at $102.38 very achievable targets.
Here's where the story gets interesting for bulls. Despite the sideways grind, Binance spot volume clocked $16.7 million over 24 hours - substantial for a mid-cap DeFi token during consolidation. The derivatives market is telling an even more compelling story with open interest holding steady at $62 million while funding rates remain neutral at 0.0027%.
The real kicker is the positioning data. While retail traders are modestly long at 54.6%, the smart money contingent - those top traders who consistently profit - are positioned 59.6% long. This divergence typically signals institutional accumulation ahead of a significant move. The balanced taker buy/sell ratio at 1.0165 suggests we're in that calm-before-the-storm phase.
The fundamental landscape for AAVE remains robust despite the lack of fresh analyst predictions this week. According to research from Blockchain.news, DeFi lending protocols continue to benefit from institutional adoption trends that began accelerating in late 2025. Without specific KOL commentary to muddy the waters, we're left with pure price action and positioning data - often the most reliable predictive tools.
The absence of bearish headlines or negative sentiment creates a neutral-to-positive backdrop for technical breakouts. In crypto markets, no news often translates to reduced selling pressure, allowing underlying demand to surface.
The probability matrix favors bulls over the next 15 days. I'm assigning 65% odds to AAVE testing the $110 zone (Bollinger upper band) within two weeks, representing a clean 12.5% gain from current levels. The path higher likely unfolds in stages: initial break above $100 psychological resistance, followed by momentum acceleration toward the $102.38 technical barrier, then a final push to $110-111.
Downside risk exists below $95.24 support, which would trigger a 7-10% correction toward the $87-90 range. However, with smart money positioning and technical indicators showing no bearish divergences, I'm assigning only 25% probability to this scenario. The remaining 10% accounts for sideways grinding between $95-100.
Risk management is straightforward: stops below $95 for swing trades, with profit-taking beginning at $108-110. The derivatives positioning suggests any pullback will be shallow and bought aggressively.

The path higher likely unfolds in stages: initial break above $100 psychological resistance, followed by momentum acceleration toward the $102.38 technical barrier, then a final push to $110-111.
Downside risk exists below $95.24 support, which would trigger a 7-10% correction toward the $87-90 range. However, with smart money positioning and technical indicators showing no bearish divergences, I'm assigning only 25% probability to this scenario. The remaining 10% accounts for sideways grinding between $95-100.
Risk management is straightforward: stops below $95 for swing trades, with profit-taking beginning at $108-110. The derivatives positioning suggests any pullback will be shallow and bought aggressively.
Hourly candlesticks (about 96 bars), same endpoint as our cryptocurrency price pages. Numbers below refresh from 1-minute klines.
Smart money positioning at 59.6% long while AAVE consolidates near $97.62 mid-range. Technical setup suggests 12-15% upside move targeting $110 resistance with 65% probability over next two weeks.
The momentum picture for AAVE is painting a classic accumulation pattern that seasoned traders recognize immediately. With RSI sitting dead center at 49.18 and MACD histogram flatlining at zero, we're witnessing that critical moment where directional conviction typically emerges. The Bollinger Band positioning at 0.50 confirms AAVE is trading exactly at the statistical mean - neither oversold nor overbought.
Price action is hugging the 20-day SMA at $97.51, creating a coiling effect that historically precedes explosive moves. The $7.49 daily ATR suggests we should expect roughly 7-8% moves when this consolidation breaks, making the immediate resistance at $100.00 and strong resistance at $102.38 very achievable targets.
Here's where the story gets interesting for bulls. Despite the sideways grind, Binance spot volume clocked $16.7 million over 24 hours - substantial for a mid-cap DeFi token during consolidation. The derivatives market is telling an even more compelling story with open interest holding steady at $62 million while funding rates remain neutral at 0.0027%.
The real kicker is the positioning data. While retail traders are modestly long at 54.6%, the smart money contingent - those top traders who consistently profit - are positioned 59.6% long. This divergence typically signals institutional accumulation ahead of a significant move. The balanced taker buy/sell ratio at 1.0165 suggests we're in that calm-before-the-storm phase.
The fundamental landscape for AAVE remains robust despite the lack of fresh analyst predictions this week. According to research from Blockchain.news, DeFi lending protocols continue to benefit from institutional adoption trends that began accelerating in late 2025. Without specific KOL commentary to muddy the waters, we're left with pure price action and positioning data - often the most reliable predictive tools.
The absence of bearish headlines or negative sentiment creates a neutral-to-positive backdrop for technical breakouts. In crypto markets, no news often translates to reduced selling pressure, allowing underlying demand to surface.
The probability matrix favors bulls over the next 15 days. I'm assigning 65% odds to AAVE testing the $110 zone (Bollinger upper band) within two weeks, representing a clean 12.5% gain from current levels. The path higher likely unfolds in stages: initial break above $100 psychological resistance, followed by momentum acceleration toward the $102.38 technical barrier, then a final push to $110-111.

However, with smart money positioning and technical indicators showing no bearish divergences, I'm assigning only 25% probability to this scenario. The remaining 10% accounts for sideways grinding between $95-100.

item.title: SHIB Price Prediction: Dead Money Until Bitcoin Breaks $70K | SHIB sits in technical no-man's-land with RSI at 52 and anemic volume. Price stays locked... https://Blockchain.News/news/20260428-shib-price-prediction-dead-money-until-bitcoin-breaks-70k
item.description:
Original title: SHIB Price Prediction: Dead Money Until Bitcoin Breaks $70K Summary: SHIB sits in technical no-man's-land with RSI at 52 and anemic volume. Price stays locked between $0.000024-$0.000027 until crypto market leadership emerges. Article text: SHIB sits in technical no-man's-land with RSI at 52 and anemic volume. Price stays locked between $0.000024-$0.000027 until crypto market leadership emerges.
SHIB has hit the wall that kills meme coin momentum: complete trader apathy. Daily volume on major exchanges has collapsed to levels that make meaningful price discovery impossible. When a token that once moved 20% on Elon Musk tweets barely budges on any news, you know the speculative energy has drained out.
The token reflects the broader meme coin malaise gripping markets. Without Bitcoin pushing toward new highs or a fresh narrative cycle, SHIB remains trapped in the twilight zone where neither bulls nor bears have conviction. This isn't technical analysis territory anymore - it's market psychology at its most neutral.
The charts tell the story of a market that's checking out. RSI sits dead center at 52, MACD shows minimal momentum either direction, and price action hugs the middle of its recent range like it's afraid to commit. Bollinger Bands have contracted to levels that typically precede either explosive moves or extended sideways grinding.
Volume patterns reveal the real issue. Without sustained buying pressure above current resistance or selling conviction below support, SHIB drifts in the technical equivalent of purgatory. The moving averages have essentially merged into a flat line - a classic setup for either a major breakout or months of boring consolidation.
Hourly candlesticks (about 96 bars), same endpoint as our cryptocurrency price pages. Numbers below refresh from 1-minute klines.
Analysts at Blockchain.news see SHIB's fate tied directly to broader crypto market leadership. The token needs Bitcoin to reclaim momentum above $70K or a fresh meme coin narrative cycle to break free from current price constraints.
The path forward splits cleanly: either SHIB breaks above $0.000027 on genuine volume expansion and targets $0.000032, or it continues grinding sideways until the next major crypto market move. Current technical setup favors consolidation between $0.000024-$0.000027 through May unless external catalysts emerge.
Range trading makes sense here. Buy support, sell resistance, keep position sizes modest. SHIB needs either Bitcoin leadership or ecosystem developments to justify directional bets beyond these technical boundaries.

item.title: WLD Price Prediction: Sub-$0.20 Breakdown Imminent as Technical Collapse Accelerates | Worldcoin's technical structure is crumbling with RSI at 39 and negative funding rates si... https://Blockchain.News/news/20260428-price-prediction-wld-sub-020-breakdown-im...
item.description:
Original title: WLD Price Prediction: Sub-$0.20 Breakdown Imminent as Technical Collapse Accelerates Summary: Worldcoin's technical structure is crumbling with RSI at 39 and negative funding rates signaling capitulation. $0.20 breach likely within 72 hours, targeting $0.15 by mid-May. Article text: Worldcoin's technical structure is crumbling with RSI at 39 and negative funding rates signaling capitulation. $0.20 breach likely within 72 hours, targeting $0.15 by mid-May.
Worldcoin is bleeding out in slow motion. Trading at $0.25 with RSI sitting at 39, we're watching a textbook breakdown unfold. The MACD histogram flat-lining at zero tells the story - momentum has completely evaporated, and buyers have thrown in the towel. What's particularly damning is WLD's position within the Bollinger Bands at just 0.20, meaning it's hugging that lower support like a desperate climber on a cliff edge.
The moving average cascade paints an even grimmer picture. Price is trading 51% below the 200-day SMA at $0.51, while even the shorter-term 20-day SMA at $0.28 acts as concrete resistance overhead. This isn't a dip - this is structural damage that screams further downside.
Here's where things get interesting from a contrarian perspective. Despite the technical carnage, Binance spot volume remains relatively healthy at $5 million daily, suggesting this isn't complete capitulation yet. But the derivatives market tells a different story entirely.
The funding rate has flipped negative at -0.0322%, meaning shorts are actually paying longs - a classic late-stage bearish signal where even the bears are getting exhausted. More telling is the aggressive selling pressure with taker buy/sell ratio at 0.87, showing market makers are getting hit with consistent sell orders. Open interest climbing 2.18% while price bleeds suggests fresh shorts are still piling in, betting on further downside.
The silence from crypto analysts regarding WLD speaks volumes. When a token that generated massive hype around its identity verification premise falls off the radar completely, it typically signals institutional disinterest has set in. Without fresh narrative catalysts or technical developments to spark renewed interest, analysts at Blockchain.news note that tokens in WLD's technical position rarely find buying support until they reach extreme oversold conditions.
The lack of recent coverage or whale accumulation signals suggests WLD is stuck in no-man's land - too damaged technically for momentum traders, yet not oversold enough for value hunters.
The path forward looks increasingly grim for WLD holders. With immediate resistance firmly planted at $0.26 and support cracking at $0.25, a break below current levels opens the door to $0.20 within 48-72 hours.
The 70% probability scenario targets $0.15-0.18 by mid-May as the next significant support zone where oversold conditions might finally attract buyers. A more aggressive 25% probability path sees WLD testing the psychological $0.10 level if broader crypto markets experience any meaningful correction.
The only bullish scenario (5% probability) requires an immediate reclaim of $0.28 with volume, but given the current momentum vacuum and negative funding dynamics, this appears highly unlikely without external catalysts.
Smart money is positioned short, retail remains stubbornly long, and the technical setup screams capitulation. The writing is on the wall for WLD in the near term.
Hourly candlesticks (about 96 bars), same endpoint as our cryptocurrency price pages. Numbers below refresh from 1-minute klines.

item.title: SUI Price Prediction: $0.88 Target Within Two Weeks as Technical Breakdown Accelerates | SUI's failure to reclaim $0.95 resistance combined with deteriorating momentum indicators... https://Blockchain.News/news/20260428-price-prediction-target-sui-088-within-...
item.description:
Original title: SUI Price Prediction: $0.88 Target Within Two Weeks as Technical Breakdown Accelerates Summary: SUI's failure to reclaim $0.95 resistance combined with deteriorating momentum indicators points to a high-probability test of $0.88 support. The token's current consolidation below key moving aver Article text: SUI's failure to reclaim $0.95 resistance combined with deteriorating momentum indicators points to a high-probability test of $0.88 support. The token's current consolidation below key moving aver...
SUI has entered a precarious position after multiple failed attempts to break above $0.95, creating a pattern that favors the bears. The token currently trades at $0.92, representing a -0.70% decline that places it firmly below critical moving averages. The 20-period simple moving average sits at $0.95, effectively capping any upside momentum and reinforcing the resistance level.
The momentum picture has deteriorated significantly, with the RSI at 46.8 indicating neither oversold conditions that might attract buyers nor the strength needed for a sustained rally. This neutral reading in a downtrending market typically precedes further weakness. The MACD histogram's position near zero reflects the absence of any meaningful directional momentum, while SUI's position within the Bollinger Bands at 0.24 shows the token hugging the lower boundary.
The derivatives landscape reveals a concerning disconnect between positioning and actual market action. While retail traders maintain a 60.5% long bias and smart money positioning shows 65.1% long exposure, the aggressive taker sell ratio of 0.69 indicates active selling pressure from larger players.
Hourly candlesticks (about 96 bars), same endpoint as our cryptocurrency price pages. Numbers below refresh from 1-minute klines.
This dynamic becomes more pronounced when examining the volume profile. With $20.4 million in spot trading volume and open interest climbing 1.05% to $83.6 million, institutional players appear to be building positions counter to retail sentiment. The neutral funding rate of 0.0012% masks underlying distribution as sophisticated traders capitalize on retail optimism.
The current technical setup analyzed by Blockchain.news suggests SUI faces significant headwinds in the near term. Without fresh catalysts to drive institutional interest, the token appears vulnerable to further technical deterioration. The absence of major endorsements from crypto thought leaders during this correction phase often signals deeper challenges ahead for altcoins.
The market structure indicates that price discovery will likely be driven by key support and resistance levels rather than fundamental developments in the immediate term.
SUI faces a high probability of testing the $0.88-$0.90 support zone within the next 10-14 trading days. The repeated rejections at $0.95 have created a descending triangle formation that typically resolves to the downside. This pattern, combined with weakening momentum, suggests limited upside potential in the short term.
A breakdown below the $0.90 level would likely accelerate selling pressure toward $0.85, where more substantial buying interest may emerge. Conversely, only a decisive break above $0.98 with strong volume would invalidate the bearish scenario and potentially target the $1.05-$1.10 range. However, given current market conditions and technical indicators, such a reversal appears unlikely in the next 30 days.
The most probable scenario involves continued consolidation below $0.95 followed by a test of lower support levels as momentum continues to deteriorate.

SUI's failure to reclaim $0.95 resistance combined with deteriorating momentum indicators points to a high-probability test of $0.88 support. The token's current consolidation below key moving aver...
SUI has entered a precarious position after multiple failed attempts to break above $0.95, creating a pattern that favors the bears. The token currently trades at $0.92, representing a -0.70% decline that places it firmly below critical moving averages. The 20-period simple moving average sits at $0.95, effectively capping any upside momentum and reinforcing the resistance level.
The momentum picture has deteriorated significantly, with the RSI at 46.8 indicating neither oversold conditions that might attract buyers nor the strength needed for a sustained rally. This neutral reading in a downtrending market typically precedes further weakness. The MACD histogram's position near zero reflects the absence of any meaningful directional momentum, while SUI's position within the Bollinger Bands at 0.24 shows the token hugging the lower boundary.
The derivatives landscape reveals a concerning disconnect between positioning and actual market action. While retail traders maintain a 60.5% long bias and smart money positioning shows 65.1% long exposure, the aggressive taker sell ratio of 0.69 indicates active selling pressure from larger players.
Hourly candlesticks (about 96 bars), same endpoint as our cryptocurrency price pages. Numbers below refresh from 1-minute klines.
This dynamic becomes more pronounced when examining the volume profile. With $20.4 million in spot trading volume and open interest climbing 1.05% to $83.6 million, institutional players appear to be building positions counter to retail sentiment. The neutral funding rate of 0.0012% masks underlying distribution as sophisticated traders capitalize on retail optimism.
The current technical setup analyzed by Blockchain.news suggests SUI faces significant headwinds in the near term. Without fresh catalysts to drive institutional interest, the token appears vulnerable to further technical deterioration. The absence of major endorsements from crypto thought leaders during this correction phase often signals deeper challenges ahead for altcoins.
The market structure indicates that price discovery will likely be driven by key support and resistance levels rather than fundamental developments in the immediate term.
SUI faces a high probability of testing the $0.88-$0.90 support zone within the next 10-14 trading days. The repeated rejections at $0.95 have created a descending triangle formation that typically resolves to the downside. This pattern, combined with weakening momentum, suggests limited upside potential in the short term.

item.title: BTC Price Prediction: $85K Target by June Despite Technical Weakness | Bitcoin's struggle at $76K reveals a market caught between bullish narratives and bearish... https://Blockchain.News/news/20260428-price-prediction-target-btc-85k-by-june-despite-technical...
item.description:
Original title: BTC Price Prediction: $85K Target by June Despite Technical Weakness Summary: Bitcoin's struggle at $76K reveals a market caught between bullish narratives and bearish reality, with technical analysis pointing toward an $85K ceiling before summer arrives. Article text: Bitcoin's struggle at $76K reveals a market caught between bullish narratives and bearish reality, with technical analysis pointing toward an $85K ceiling before summer arrives.
Bitcoin trades at $76,838 after dropping 1.23% in 24 hours, trapped in a consolidation pattern that's becoming harder to ignore. The cryptocurrency sits below its 7-day moving average at $77,766, signaling short-term weakness despite months of institutional adoption headlines.
The derivatives market reveals the truth behind the price action. Funding rates have turned negative at -0.0032%, while retail positioning shows 47.3% long versus 52.7% short - hardly the setup for a parabolic move higher. Open interest of $7.56 billion represents steady institutional presence without the explosive growth needed for major breakouts.
Bitcoin's technical picture tells two different stories depending on your timeframe. The cryptocurrency trades above both 20 and 50-day moving averages, suggesting medium-term strength, but remains 9.2% below the critical 200-day moving average at $84,599. This gap represents the key battleground for any sustained rally.
Momentum indicators paint a mixed picture. The RSI sits at 57.77, leaving room for upside movement without entering overbought territory. However, the MACD histogram has flattened to zero, indicating stalled momentum at current levels. Within the Bollinger Bands, Bitcoin occupies the 0.65 position - closer to the upper resistance at $79,913 than lower support, but without conviction to break through.
Hourly candlesticks (about 96 bars), same endpoint as our cryptocurrency price pages. Numbers below refresh from 1-minute klines.
According to analysts at Blockchain.news, this technical setup often precedes either a decisive move in either direction, making the next few weeks critical for determining Bitcoin's path through Q2.
The bull case centers on Bitcoin's ability to reclaim the $79K resistance level and subsequently the 200-day moving average. A clean break above $84,599 with volume would open the door to test the $90K-$95K zone, with $85K representing a realistic target by June given current momentum patterns.
This scenario requires sustained buying pressure that hasn't materialized in recent weeks. The path higher depends on Bitcoin generating upside momentum soon, as seasonal patterns typically favor cryptocurrency strength in Q2 but require early positioning to capitalize.
The bear case carries more weight given current market structure. Failure to hold the $75,335 support level would trigger a test of the 50-day moving average near $71K. This outcome becomes increasingly probable if Bitcoin can't generate meaningful upside within the next two weeks.
Current market conditions suggest a 60% probability Bitcoin reaches $85K by June, contingent on breaking above the 200-day moving average within the next month. A 30% chance exists for a retreat toward $71K support if momentum continues to fade. The remaining 10% accounts for unexpected catalyst-driven moves in either direction.
The key inflection point remains the $79K-$84K zone, where Bitcoin must prove it can sustain institutional demand at higher prices. Without this confirmation, the cryptocurrency faces another period of range-bound trading that could extend well into summer.

item.title: Jack Dorsey’s Block Introduces Bitcoin Proof-of-Reserves | Block unveils proof-of-reserves for its 8,883 BTC treasury, Cash App, and Square users, a... https://Blockchain.News/news/jack-dorsey-block-bitcoin-proof-of-reserves
item.description:
Original title: Jack Dorsey’s Block Introduces Bitcoin Proof-of-Reserves Summary: Block unveils proof-of-reserves for its 8,883 BTC treasury, Cash App, and Square users, aiming to boost transparency amid FTX-fueled demand for audits. Article text: Block unveils proof-of-reserves for its 8,883 BTC treasury, Cash App, and Square users, aiming to boost transparency amid FTX-fueled demand for audits.
Jack Dorsey’s Block has launched a Bitcoin proof-of-reserves (PoR) feature, allowing investors and users of its flagship products, Cash App and Square, to independently verify the firm’s Bitcoin holdings. The announcement was made on April 28, alongside other Bitcoin-focused updates, as part of the company’s ongoing push to enhance transparency and consumer trust.
Block’s corporate Bitcoin treasury currently holds 8,883 BTC, valued at approximately $681.4 million based on Bitcoin’s price of $77,839.68 on launch day. These holdings place Block as the 14th-largest corporate Bitcoin owner globally, according to BitcoinTreasuries.net. Users can confirm reserves on-chain through cryptographic signatures, ensuring that the assets are actively controlled rather than merely observed.
"People shouldn’t have to trust that their Bitcoin is there—they should be able to verify it," Block noted in its announcement, emphasizing its commitment to transparency. This marks a significant move in an industry shaken by the collapse of FTX in November 2022, where mismanagement of customer funds led to losses in the billions. Since then, proof-of-reserves has gained traction as a standard for reassuring customers that their assets are fully backed and secure.
In addition to PoR, Block also introduced a Bitkey hardware wallet with a touchscreen and new Cash App features, such as automatic Bitcoin conversion for selected payments and 5% Bitcoin cashback rewards at Square merchants. The company has also raised Bitcoin withdrawal limits to $10,000 per day and $25,000 per week, signaling its confidence in scaling Bitcoin as a payment system.
While Block's move aligns with growing demand for financial transparency, not everyone sees proof-of-reserves as a universally positive development. Michael Saylor, executive chairman of Strategy, the largest corporate Bitcoin holder, has publicly criticized PoR. In May 2025, he argued that it poses security risks, potentially exposing sensitive information and diluting the security of custodians and investors. Strategy has notably refrained from issuing proof-of-reserves for its treasury, which dwarfs Block’s holdings.
Despite the criticism, major exchanges like Binance, Kraken, and Bitfinex have embraced PoR mechanisms, leveraging them to build user trust in a competitive and often volatile crypto market.
Block’s embrace of PoR comes as the broader crypto industry faces increased regulatory scrutiny and an ongoing trust deficit. For traders, it’s a signal that institutions are willing to adopt practices that prioritize transparency, potentially setting a new benchmark for corporate treasuries and consumer-facing platforms. With $2 billion in Bitcoin holdings as of Q1 2026 and a suite of Bitcoin-focused services, Dorsey’s firm is positioning itself as a leader in mainstream Bitcoin adoption.
As Bitcoin hovers near $78,000, down slightly by 0.19% over the past 24 hours, the market’s reaction to Block’s announcements is worth watching. The combination of transparency measures and product enhancements could attract more retail and institutional engagement, potentially driving further adoption of Bitcoin as a global payment system.

item.title: How to Build a Top-Tier Enterprise Sales Team, Step by Step | Learn the keys to building a world-class enterprise sales team, from hiring the right lea... https://Blockchain.News/news/world-class-enterprise-sales-team
item.description:
Original title: How to Build a Top-Tier Enterprise Sales Team, Step by Step Summary: Learn the keys to building a world-class enterprise sales team, from hiring the right leaders to structuring repeatable processes for scaling. Article text: Learn the keys to building a world-class enterprise sales team, from hiring the right leaders to structuring repeatable processes for scaling.
Building a standout enterprise sales team isn’t just important—it’s essential for scaling any company, especially as industries like crypto enter the enterprise adoption phase. As Jason Rosenthal from a16z details, the myth that great products sell themselves often leads founders to undervalue sales. But in reality, sales is as critical as engineering when it comes to sustaining growth and staying competitive.
Here are the key steps to building a world-class sales organization according to Rosenthal’s playbook.
Your first—and most important—hire is a sales leader. This person doesn’t just manage the team; they write the playbook for how your company wins deals. They need a direct line to the CEO and a seat at the executive table. Founders often make the mistake of hiring junior salespeople first or delaying this hire too long. Both moves are costly. A capable sales leader will want to build and shape their own team and should be brought on as soon as the company is nearing product-market fit.
Like coding or manufacturing, sales thrives on repeatable systems. Define clear steps for every sales role, from initial outreach to closing deals. A well-structured playbook ensures your team sets the agenda with customers and avoids playing catch-up with competitors.
Winning early, strategic accounts—often called “lighthouse customers”—is crucial. These accounts not only generate revenue but also validate your offering for the broader market. A deep understanding of your customer’s business priorities and how your product solves their problems is key to creating urgency and winning their business.
No sales team wins every deal, but the best ones conduct rigorous after-action reviews. Analyze why deals were lost—was it a product gap, late entry, or execution failure? Use these insights to refine both your sales process and your product roadmap.
Equally important is understanding how competitors are shaping market expectations. If they’re first to key accounts, they’ll set the rules of engagement, from feature requirements to pricing benchmarks. Being first to strategic accounts gives your team the power to influence these dynamics.
Sales doesn’t stand still, especially in fast-evolving industries like crypto. Regular win-loss analyses, customer feedback loops, and training boot camps ensure your team stays sharp. Focus on retaining lighthouse customers, as their success stories resonate with future buyers and help solidify your market position.
Finally, study how your best customers use your product. Use their feedback to reduce friction, enhance ROI, and feed insights into your sales, product, and marketing strategies. This virtuous cycle not only improves customer outcomes but also strengthens your business.
The takeaway is simple: Great products don’t sell themselves. Founders must approach sales with the same rigor and focus they bring to product development. By hiring the right team, building repeatable processes, and learning from both wins and losses, companies can unlock sustainable growth and outmaneuver competitors in even the most competitive markets.
Learn the keys to building a world-class enterprise sales team, from hiring the right leaders to structuring repeatable processes for scaling.

No sales team wins every deal, but the best ones conduct rigorous after-action reviews. Analyze why deals were lost—was it a product gap, late entry, or execution failure? Use these insights to refine both your sales process and your product roadmap.
Equally important is understanding how competitors are shaping market expectations. If they’re first to key accounts, they’ll set the rules of engagement, from feature requirements to pricing benchmarks. Being first to strategic accounts gives your team the power to influence these dynamics.
Sales doesn’t stand still, especially in fast-evolving industries like crypto. Regular win-loss analyses, customer feedback loops, and training boot camps ensure your team stays sharp. Focus on retaining lighthouse customers, as their success stories resonate with future buyers and help solidify your market position.
Finally, study how your best customers use your product. Use their feedback to reduce friction, enhance ROI, and feed insights into your sales, product, and marketing strategies. This virtuous cycle not only improves customer outcomes but also strengthens your business.
The takeaway is simple: Great products don’t sell themselves. Founders must approach sales with the same rigor and focus they bring to product development. By hiring the right team, building repeatable processes, and learning from both wins and losses, companies can unlock sustainable growth and outmaneuver competitors in even the most competitive markets.
Learn the keys to building a world-class enterprise sales team, from hiring the right leaders to structuring repeatable processes for scaling.
Building a standout enterprise sales team isn’t just important—it’s essential for scaling any company, especially as industries like crypto enter the enterprise adoption phase. As Jason Rosenthal from a16z details, the myth that great products sell themselves often leads founders to undervalue sales. But in reality, sales is as critical as engineering when it comes to sustaining growth and staying competitive.
Here are the key steps to building a world-class sales organization according to Rosenthal’s playbook.
Your first—and most important—hire is a sales leader. This person doesn’t just manage the team; they write the playbook for how your company wins deals. They need a direct line to the CEO and a seat at the executive table. Founders often make the mistake of hiring junior salespeople first or delaying this hire too long. Both moves are costly. A capable sales leader will want to build and shape their own team and should be brought on as soon as the company is nearing product-market fit.
Like coding or manufacturing, sales thrives on repeatable systems. Define clear steps for every sales role, from initial outreach to closing deals. A well-structured playbook ensures your team sets the agenda with customers and avoids playing catch-up with competitors.
Winning early, strategic accounts—often called “lighthouse customers”—is crucial. These accounts not only generate revenue but also validate your offering for the broader market. A deep understanding of your customer’s business priorities and how your product solves their problems is key to creating urgency and winning their business.
No sales team wins every deal, but the best ones conduct rigorous after-action reviews. Analyze why deals were lost—was it a product gap, late entry, or execution failure? Use these insights to refine both your sales process and your product roadmap.
Equally important is understanding how competitors are shaping market expectations. If they’re first to key accounts, they’ll set the rules of engagement, from feature requirements to pricing benchmarks. Being first to strategic accounts gives your team the power to influence these dynamics.
Sales doesn’t stand still, especially in fast-evolving industries like crypto. Regular win-loss analyses, customer feedback loops, and training boot camps ensure your team stays sharp. Focus on retaining lighthouse customers, as their success stories resonate with future buyers and help solidify your market position.

item.title: AVAX Price Prediction: $8.50 Target Looms as Bears Control the Narrative | AVAX trades at $9.25 with negative funding rates and broken technical support pointing to... https://Blockchain.News/news/20260427-price-prediction-target-avax-850-looms-as-bears-contr...
item.description:
Original title: AVAX Price Prediction: $8.50 Target Looms as Bears Control the Narrative Summary: AVAX trades at $9.25 with negative funding rates and broken technical support pointing toward an $8.50 retest. The path of least resistance remains down until buyers emerge at deeper discount level Article text: AVAX trades at $9.25 with negative funding rates and broken technical support pointing toward an $8.50 retest. The path of least resistance remains down until buyers emerge at deeper discount levels.
AVAX sits trapped at $9.25, trading 27% below its 200-day moving average of $12.58 and unable to reclaim even short-term support levels. The altcoin's failure to hold above clustered moving averages around $9.35 reveals institutional money has stepped aside, leaving retail to absorb the selling pressure.
While major cryptocurrencies show selective strength, AVAX's 2% daily decline exposes the harsh reality facing Layer 1 alternatives in 2026's shifting market narrative. The price action suggests distribution rather than accumulation, with smart money clearly reading the technical breakdown across multiple timeframes.
The momentum indicators align in bearish formation despite retail optimism. RSI sits at 48.51 in neutral territory while MACD histogram flatlining at zero shows complete momentum stagnation. AVAX's position at just 35% within its Bollinger Bands signals preparation for another leg lower rather than healthy consolidation.
Derivatives markets amplify the warning signals that spot traders continue ignoring. Negative funding rates of -0.0182% mean short positions are so confident they're paying longs to maintain their bearish bets. Combined with declining open interest down 4.12% in 24 hours, institutional money is exiting positions rather than adding exposure.
The data reveals conflicting signals between retail sentiment and professional positioning. While retail maintains a 63.2% long bias, top traders hold a 68.7% long ratio according to analysts at Blockchain.news. This suggests whales see eventual value in AVAX but are likely waiting for deeper discounts before meaningful accumulation begins.
The aggressive buying ratio of 1.62 indicates someone is accumulating shares, but smart money rarely catches falling knives. Professional traders typically wait for capitulation before deploying significant capital, suggesting current prices haven't reached their pain threshold.
AVAX faces a critical juncture at current levels. Immediate support at $9.12 must hold to prevent acceleration toward $8.98, where stronger buying interest historically emerged. Failure at both levels opens the door to $8.50, where meaningful value buyers are likely positioned for substantial accumulation.
Hourly candlesticks (about 96 bars), same endpoint as our cryptocurrency price pages. Numbers below refresh from 1-minute klines.
Any recovery attempt requires reclaiming $9.70 resistance and establishing support above the Bollinger midpoint at $9.36. Success could trigger short covering toward $10.50-$11.00, but current momentum decay suggests this scenario carries lower probability than continued downside pressure.
The derivatives market structure supports the bearish thesis until AVAX reaches levels where institutional buyers see compelling risk-reward ratios. While longer-term upside targets remain intact for the second and third quarters, the immediate technical setup favors patience over aggressive positioning at current prices.

item.title: DOT Price Prediction: Bulls Eye $1.50 Breakout as Whales Stack at $1.20 Floor | DOT trades at $1.23 with institutional money loading the dip while retail shorts pile on—... https://Blockchain.News/news/20260427-price-prediction-dot-bulls-eye-150-breakout-as-w...
item.description:
Original title: DOT Price Prediction: Bulls Eye $1.50 Breakout as Whales Stack at $1.20 Floor Summary: DOT trades at $1.23 with institutional money loading the dip while retail shorts pile on—a classic contrarian setup targeting $1.50 if the $1.20 support wall holds through this week's volatility. Article text: DOT trades at $1.23 with institutional money loading the dip while retail shorts pile on—a classic contrarian setup targeting $1.50 if the $1.20 support wall holds through this week's volatility.
DOT sits compressed at $1.23, down 2.45% as bears test resolve around critical support. The token trades between razor-thin bands with $1.27 acting as immediate resistance and $1.22 providing the floor. Volume has dried to $5 million on Binance spot, creating the textbook setup for an explosive move once this coil unwinds.
Momentum indicators paint a neutral picture that masks the underlying tension. With RSI holding steady at 44 and MACD histogram flatlining at zero, neither side controls the narrative yet. The market waits for a catalyst.
The derivatives market tells the real story. Negative funding rates of -0.0217% mean shorts are bleeding money to keep positions open—a warning sign when positioning becomes this lopsided. While retail traders maintain their usual long bias at 64.4%, institutional whales have pushed even harder with 68.5% long exposure.
This alignment between retail and smart money breaks the typical pattern where institutions fade retail sentiment. When whales and retail point the same direction, explosive moves often follow.
DOT trades in the lower third of its Bollinger Bands at the 0.34 position, signaling oversold momentum without reaching panic levels. The 7-day and 20-day moving averages converge near $1.26, creating a resistance cluster that bulls must crack to signal trend change.
Above $1.29, the path opens toward the 50-day moving average at $1.34. Breaking this level would confirm bears have lost control and open runway for a sustained rally toward $1.50—a 22% move that aligns with DOT's 60-cent daily average true range.
Support sits firmly at $1.22, backed by the lower Bollinger Band at $1.18. A clean break below $1.20 would invalidate the bull case and trigger stops toward deeper support zones.
Hourly candlesticks (about 96 bars), same endpoint as our cryptocurrency price pages. Numbers below refresh from 1-minute klines.
Bulls have the cleaner risk profile here. Entry between $1.20-$1.23 offers tight stops below $1.18 while targeting $1.29 resistance first, then $1.34 if momentum builds. The whale positioning and negative funding provide fundamental support for this directional bias.
Bears face an uphill battle against institutional flows and costly funding. Any short positions require discipline with stops above $1.29, as breaking this level could trigger violent short covering given the derivatives positioning.
The balanced taker buy/sell ratio at 0.948 shows neither side dominating order flow yet, but the funding dynamics and whale accumulation tilt odds toward the bulls if support holds through this critical test.
Analysts at Blockchain.news note that DOT's current setup mirrors successful breakout patterns from earlier in the year, where similar compression phases led to 20-30% rallies within days of resolution.

This alignment between retail and smart money breaks the typical pattern where institutions fade retail sentiment. When whales and retail point the same direction, explosive moves often follow.

item.title: MATIC Price Prediction: Relief Rally to $0.44 Before May Collapse to $0.32 | MATIC's technical bounce from oversold levels targets $0.44 resistance, but trading benea... https://Blockchain.News/news/20260427-price-prediction-matic-relief-rally-to-044-before-m...
item.description:
Original title: MATIC Price Prediction: Relief Rally to $0.44 Before May Collapse to $0.32 Summary: MATIC's technical bounce from oversold levels targets $0.44 resistance, but trading beneath all major moving averages signals institutional distribution ahead of a deeper decline to $0.32. Article text: MATIC's technical bounce from oversold levels targets $0.44 resistance, but trading beneath all major moving averages signals institutional distribution ahead of a deeper decline to $0.32.
MATIC trades at $0.38 with momentum indicators flashing mixed signals that reveal underlying weakness. The RSI sits at 38.00 in neutral territory while the MACD histogram hovers near zero, creating a setup where price action lacks decisive direction. Volume remains thin at $1.07 million on Binance over 24 hours, suggesting institutional players remain on the sidelines during this 0.29% daily decline.
The moving average structure exposes the token's vulnerability. MATIC trades below every major timeframe average, from the 20-day at $0.43 through the 200-day at $0.69. This bearish alignment typically signals institutional distribution rather than accumulation, creating overhead resistance that will challenge any bounce attempts.
Bollinger Bands position MATIC at 0.29 on the scale, dangerously close to the lower boundary at $0.31. The proximity to this technical floor suggests oversold conditions, but the lack of buying pressure at these levels indicates potential further weakness.
Resistance forms a clear hierarchy above current price. The 20-day SMA at $0.43 represents initial overhead pressure, while the 50-day at $0.45 creates a secondary ceiling. These former support levels have inverted to resistance following the recent breakdown, making any rally attempt face substantial technical headwinds.
Stochastic indicators (%K at 25.19, %D at 20.15) confirm oversold readings, though bear markets can maintain these conditions for extended periods. The 7-day SMA at $0.37 sits just below current price, demonstrating how even short-term momentum remains fragmented.
The derivatives market shows balanced positioning with funding rates at neutral 0.0100%. This equilibrium suggests any major price movement will emerge from spot market dynamics rather than leveraged position liquidations, making technical levels more reliable for directional bias.
Analysts at Blockchain.news have identified this setup as particularly vulnerable, noting how the combination of oversold technicals and bearish moving average alignment creates conflicting forces. The probability of a relief rally to test overhead resistance remains elevated, but the structural damage suggests any bounce serves as distribution rather than trend reversal.
The technical setup favors a two-phase scenario. MATIC's oversold condition supports a bounce toward the $0.41-$0.44 zone where moving average resistance converges. This represents 8-16% upside potential from current levels, but traders should view any rally as a shorting opportunity rather than bullish continuation.
Short entries become attractive on rejection at the $0.42-$0.44 resistance cluster. Risk management requires stops above $0.46 to account for potential overthrow, while downside targets align with the $0.32 level where technical support may emerge. This projection represents 16% downside from current levels and coincides with the Bollinger Band lower boundary.
Position sizing becomes critical given the 14-day ATR of $0.02, which suggests daily volatility ranges of 5-6%. Conservative risk allocation of maximum 2% portfolio exposure helps manage the whipsaw potential inherent in this uncertain momentum environment.
The probability matrix weights toward eventual weakness: while oversold conditions support near-term bounces, the breakdown below all major moving averages suggests institutional selling pressure will ultimately overwhelm retail buying attempts, targeting the $0.32 level by early May.
Hourly candlesticks (about 96 bars), same endpoint as our cryptocurrency price pages. Numbers below refresh from 1-minute klines.

Bollinger Bands position MATIC at 0.29 on the scale, dangerously close to the lower boundary at $0.31. The proximity to this technical floor suggests oversold conditions, but the lack of buying pressure at these levels indicates potential further weakness.
Resistance forms a clear hierarchy above current price. The 20-day SMA at $0.43 represents initial overhead pressure, while the 50-day at $0.45 creates a secondary ceiling. These former support levels have inverted to resistance following the recent breakdown, making any rally attempt face substantial technical headwinds.
Stochastic indicators (%K at 25.19, %D at 20.15) confirm oversold readings, though bear markets can maintain these conditions for extended periods. The 7-day SMA at $0.37 sits just below current price, demonstrating how even short-term momentum remains fragmented.
The derivatives market shows balanced positioning with funding rates at neutral 0.0100%. This equilibrium suggests any major price movement will emerge from spot market dynamics rather than leveraged position liquidations, making technical levels more reliable for directional bias.

item.title: Digital Asset Inflows Hit $1.2B, Bitcoin Leads With $933M | Institutional demand drives $1.2B in digital asset inflows, with Bitcoin hitting $76K and... https://Blockchain.News/news/digital-asset-inflows-1-2b-bitcoin-933m
item.description:
Original title: Digital Asset Inflows Hit $1.2B, Bitcoin Leads With $933M Summary: Institutional demand drives $1.2B in digital asset inflows, with Bitcoin hitting $76K and blockchain equities seeing record interest. Article text: Institutional demand drives $1.2B in digital asset inflows, with Bitcoin hitting $76K and blockchain equities seeing record interest.
Digital asset investment products saw inflows of $1.2 billion last week, marking the fourth consecutive week of positive flows, according to the latest report from CoinShares. Bitcoin (BTC) led the charge, accounting for $933 million of the total, as the cryptocurrency surged past $76,000 for the first time since February.
Total assets under management (AuM) in digital investment products rose to $155 billion, the highest level since February 1, but still shy of the October 2025 peak of $263 billion. Institutional demand appears to be driving the surge, as investors position ahead of the Federal Open Market Committee (FOMC) decision this week, scheduled for April 28–29.
The U.S. dominated inflows by region, contributing $1.1 billion, while Germany saw a sharp increase to $61.7 million, more than double the prior week's figure. Switzerland, which had recorded a significant $138 million in outflows the previous week, rebounded with $35.2 million in inflows. Canada also reported $15 million in inflows, indicating broader participation across major markets.
Ethereum (ETH) also performed strongly, attracting $192 million in inflows, marking the third consecutive week above $190 million. XRP returned to net inflows after experiencing outflows the previous week, signaling renewed interest in altcoins.
One standout trend was the explosion in demand for blockchain equity ETFs, which saw $617 million in inflows over the past three weeks, including record weekly inflows during this period. These products are increasingly viewed as a way for investors to gain exposure to blockchain technology without directly holding digital assets.
Meanwhile, short-Bitcoin products attracted $16.5 million in inflows, consistent with the prior month’s average, reflecting steady but not heightened demand for bearish bets amid Bitcoin’s rally.
With Bitcoin trading at its highest levels in months and Ethereum maintaining strong inflows, investor sentiment appears to be improving. However, the upcoming FOMC meeting could introduce volatility, as markets await clarity on U.S. monetary policy. For now, the sustained inflows and record interest in blockchain equities suggest that institutional appetite for digital assets remains robust.

item.title: SOL Price Prediction: $95 Target Within 14 Days as Whale Accumulation Accelerates | Solana trades at $85.53 with institutional players holding 74% long positions while techn... https://Blockchain.News/news/20260427-price-prediction-target-sol-95-within-14-day...
item.description:
Original title: SOL Price Prediction: $95 Target Within 14 Days as Whale Accumulation Accelerates Summary: Solana trades at $85.53 with institutional players holding 74% long positions while technical indicators align for a breakout. The path to $95 opens as smart money accumulates against retail pessim Article text: Solana trades at $85.53 with institutional players holding 74% long positions while technical indicators align for a breakout. The path to $95 opens as smart money accumulates against retail pessim...
Solana has consolidated at $85.53, positioned between critical support and resistance levels that set the stage for the next major move. The 20-day moving average at $85.44 provides immediate support while the RSI at 49.97 shows neither overbought nor oversold conditions - prime territory for directional momentum.
The MACD histogram sits at zero, marking a classic inflection point where price action typically accelerates once direction is chosen. Bollinger Bands position SOL with clear runway to the upper band at $89.12, while daily volatility of $3.18 indicates the market is coiling for larger moves. This technical setup mirrors patterns that preceded significant rallies in previous cycles.
Derivatives data exposes the real sentiment behind recent price action. Top traders maintain 74.4% long positions against just 25.7% short - a stark contrast to the surface-level bearish narrative. This institutional positioning doesn't reflect speculative gambling but calculated accumulation by sophisticated market participants.
The funding rate sits at -0.0021%, meaning short sellers are paying longs to hold their positions. Open interest remains robust at $789 million despite the recent pullback, indicating controlled profit-taking rather than panic selling. The taker buy/sell ratio of 0.90 shows balanced order flow, confirming this is repositioning rather than capitulation.
The analysts at Blockchain.news identify multiple confluence factors supporting upward momentum over the next two weeks. Immediate resistance at $87.39 becomes the first target, with a break above this level opening the path to $89.12 where the upper Bollinger Band creates natural resistance.
Beyond that technical ceiling, $95 emerges as the primary target - a level that aligns with both psychological significance and measured move projections from the current base. The 200-day moving average at $120.63 confirms SOL remains in broader correction territory, making the current consolidation a potential accumulation zone rather than distribution.
Risk management favors the long side with support holding at $83.19, creating an asymmetric setup that favors upside participation. The combination of whale positioning, technical alignment, and measured sentiment creates conditions where $95 becomes achievable within 14 days.
Hourly candlesticks (about 96 bars), same endpoint as our cryptocurrency price pages. Numbers below refresh from 1-minute klines.
Monitor open interest for expansion above $800 million coupled with funding rates flipping positive - these shifts will confirm institutional momentum is building. The current setup rewards patience while the market resolves its directional bias, with all indicators pointing toward the $95 target by early May.

item.title: ADA Price Prediction: Relief Rally to $0.28 Then Collapse to $0.22 | Cardano preps for a short-lived bounce to $0.28 before smart money exits trigger the real... https://Blockchain.News/news/20260427-price-prediction-ada-relief-rally-to-028-then-collapse
item.description:
Original title: ADA Price Prediction: Relief Rally to $0.28 Then Collapse to $0.22 Summary: Cardano preps for a short-lived bounce to $0.28 before smart money exits trigger the real move down to $0.22 support. Technical setup screams temporary reprieve followed by capitulation. Article text: Cardano preps for a short-lived bounce to $0.28 before smart money exits trigger the real move down to $0.22 support. Technical setup screams temporary reprieve followed by capitulation.
Cardano trades at $0.25 in a state of suspended animation. Three critical moving averages have converged at this exact price point, creating a technical knot that demands violent resolution. When short, medium, and long-term trends collapse into identical values, markets typically explode in one direction within days.
The momentum picture tells two stories. RSI sits dead center at 47, revealing neither bulls nor bears control the narrative. Meanwhile, MACD has flatlined at zero—the classic signature of a market holding its breath before the next major move. This isn't healthy consolidation; it's the calm before directional chaos.
Bollinger Bands paint the clearest picture of impending volatility. ADA hugs the middle band while the entire range has compressed to just $0.02 between upper and lower bounds. When bands squeeze this tight around a major support level, the subsequent move often exceeds 15-20% in whichever direction breaks first.
The positioning data exposes a dangerous divergence that typically precedes major price dislocations. Retail traders have stacked 68.8% of accounts long, betting on upside continuation. Yet the taker buy/sell ratio of 0.89 shows aggressive selling pressure outweighing buying interest by $1.7 million in the past hour alone.
Even more telling: top traders maintain 72.2% long positions while open interest dropped 4.74% in 24 hours. This combination signals institutional players reducing exposure despite maintaining bullish positioning—classic distribution behavior. The negative funding rate of -0.0058% pays shorts to hold positions, confirming underlying bearish pressure building beneath the surface.
Volume analysis reveals the truth behind recent price action. While $23.4 million traded in 24 hours appears healthy, this volume occurred within a microscopic $0.01 range. Such intense activity in minimal price movement indicates large holders distributing into retail strength rather than genuine accumulation.
Blockchain.news analysts note that despite Bitcoin's institutional momentum above $78,000 and major corporate acquisitions exceeding $2.5 billion, Cardano remains disconnected from the broader crypto rally. This divergence highlights ADA's fundamental vulnerability—without specific catalysts or development milestones, the token relies purely on technical positioning and market sentiment.
The absence of meaningful fundamental drivers leaves ADA exposed to trader positioning dynamics rather than genuine investment demand. When markets lack narrative support, technical levels become the primary battleground for price discovery.
ADA faces binary outcomes over the next 14 days with clearly defined trigger points. The primary scenario carries 65% probability: initial relief toward $0.26 upper band resistance, potentially extending to $0.28 as shorts cover and retail FOMO accelerates.
However, this bounce represents a classic bull trap. Smart money will use any spike above $0.26 to complete distribution, triggering cascading selling toward $0.24 support and ultimately the $0.22 level where major accumulation occurred in previous cycles.
The alternative path holds 35% probability: immediate breakdown below $0.24 without relief, accelerating toward $0.20 psychological support as leveraged positions face liquidation. This scenario activates if Bitcoin fails current levels or broader risk-off sentiment emerges.
Critical triggers: Break above $0.26 with volume confirms temporary $0.28 target. Failure to reclaim $0.25 signals direct route to $0.22. The next 72 hours determine ADA's path as compressed volatility demands resolution.
Hourly candlesticks (about 96 bars), same endpoint as our cryptocurrency price pages. Numbers below refresh from 1-minute klines.

item.title: France Charges 88 in Crackdown on Crypto Wrench Attacks | French authorities charge 88 individuals, including minors, for violent crypto wrench att... https://Blockchain.News/news/france-charges-88-crypto-wrench-attacks
item.description:
Original title: France Charges 88 in Crackdown on Crypto Wrench Attacks Summary: French authorities charge 88 individuals, including minors, for violent crypto wrench attacks; 75 suspects are in pretrial detention as investigations continue. Article text: French authorities charge 88 individuals, including minors, for violent crypto wrench attacks; 75 suspects are in pretrial detention as investigations continue.
French authorities have charged 88 individuals, including 10 minors, in connection with a wave of violent "wrench attacks" targeting cryptocurrency holders. Of those charged, 75 are being held in pretrial detention, according to Vanessa Perrée, France’s national prosecutor for organized crime. The arrests span 12 cases currently under investigation by specialized judges in the Paris Judicial Court.
Wrench attacks—named after a satirical webcomic highlighting how physical force can bypass digital security—typically involve coercing victims to surrender crypto wallet credentials through methods like home invasions, kidnappings, and extortion. The rise of these attacks reflects a troubling trend in offline security risks tied to digital asset ownership.
France has seen a marked increase in such incidents. According to the National Prosecutor's Office for Organized Crime (PNACO), there were 18 wrench attacks in 2024, 67 in 2025, and 47 already reported in 2026. Global data supports this surge, with blockchain security firm CertiK reporting a 75% uptick in such attacks worldwide in 2025 compared to the previous year.
Investigators believe these crimes are not isolated incidents but the work of structured criminal networks. "These consolidations were made possible through the identification of individuals recurrently involved in multiple cases," Perrée said in a statement. Ongoing investigations aim to uncover financial channels, apprehend additional perpetrators, and dismantle these networks entirely.
As cryptocurrency ownership becomes increasingly visible due to rising asset values—Bitcoin (BTC), for instance, is trading at $64,000 as of April 27, 2026—criminals appear more incentivized to target holders. Blockchain intelligence firm TRM Labs has attributed the rise in attacks to the perceived pseudonymity of crypto transactions and the ease with which personal data can be obtained online.
Perrée urged crypto holders to adopt stricter personal security measures, emphasizing the dangers of "overexposure on social networks that could make them targets." Publicly sharing crypto holdings, for example, can provide attackers with the information they need to identify high-value victims.
Telegram founder Pavel Durov recently suggested that some of these attacks in France may have been fueled by the misuse of crypto investors' tax data, allegedly leaked by a former tax official. While authorities have not confirmed this, it underscores the broader challenges of protecting personal information in a digital age.
For crypto holders, the risks extend far beyond online scams or exchange hacks. Wrench attacks demonstrate how physical security must be part of any robust crypto asset protection strategy. Avoiding unnecessary public disclosure and implementing multi-layered security practices, such as hardware wallets stored in secure locations, can reduce exposure to these threats.
With 88 individuals already charged and investigations ongoing, French authorities appear committed to curbing this alarming trend. However, as crypto values continue to rise, so too does the incentive for criminals to exploit the industry’s vulnerabilities, both digital and physical.

item.title: Google DeepMind Partners with South Korea for AI Campus | DeepMind teams up with Korea's MSIT to launch an AI Campus focused on scientific breakthr... https://Blockchain.News/news/google-deepmind-partners-south-korea-ai-campus
item.description:
Original title: Google DeepMind Partners with South Korea for AI Campus Summary: DeepMind teams up with Korea's MSIT to launch an AI Campus focused on scientific breakthroughs, AI safety, and talent development. Article text: DeepMind teams up with Korea's MSIT to launch an AI Campus focused on scientific breakthroughs, AI safety, and talent development.
Google DeepMind has announced a partnership with South Korea’s Ministry of Science and ICT (MSIT) to establish an AI Campus in Seoul. This collaboration aims to accelerate scientific breakthroughs, nurture local AI talent, and explore advancements in AI safety research. The partnership is part of Korea’s broader K-Moonshot Missions initiative, which focuses on addressing national scientific challenges and boosting research productivity.
The planned AI Campus will serve as a hub for collaboration between Korean research institutions and Google’s AI experts. Initial partnerships include Seoul National University (SNU), Korea Advanced Institute of Science and Technology (KAIST), and the Ministry’s AI Bio Innovation Hubs. Together, they will leverage DeepMind’s cutting-edge AI technologies across fields such as life sciences, energy, weather, and climate science.
In addition to research, the partnership aims to foster AI talent in Korea. Google DeepMind plans to create internship opportunities for Korean students, building on Google’s recent initiative to provide 50,000 AI Essentials scholarships in the region. This aligns with Korea’s growing investment in AI infrastructure, including the upcoming launch of the National AI for Science Center (NAIS) in May 2026.
AI safety is also a cornerstone of the partnership. Following Google’s 2024 Frontier AI Safety Commitments at the AI Seoul Summit, DeepMind will collaborate with the Korean AI Safety Institute (AISI) on best practices and research to ensure responsible development and deployment of AI technologies.
This move builds on DeepMind’s legacy in Korea, which began with the highly publicized AlphaGo victory over Go champion Lee Sedol in 2016. The new partnership underscores DeepMind’s ambitions to remain a global leader in AI while contributing to scientific and societal progress.
For investors tracking Alphabet Inc. (NASDAQ: GOOGL), DeepMind’s parent company, this partnership highlights the tech giant’s focus on AI-driven innovation and its expanding footprint in Asia. While direct financial implications remain unclear, the strategic importance of AI leadership positions Alphabet well in an increasingly competitive sector.

item.title: Prediction Markets Driven by 3.5% of Users, Study Finds | New research reveals that an 'informed minority' drives price accuracy in prediction mark... https://Blockchain.News/news/prediction-markets-informed-minority-study
item.description:
Original title: Prediction Markets Driven by 3.5% of Users, Study Finds Summary: New research reveals that an 'informed minority' drives price accuracy in prediction markets, raising questions about fairness and insider trading risks. Article text: New research reveals that an 'informed minority' drives price accuracy in prediction markets, raising questions about fairness and insider trading risks.
Prediction markets, often touted as a tool for crowd-sourced forecasting, are dominated by a small, highly informed group of traders, according to a study by researchers from London Business School and Yale University. The study analyzed Polymarket data from 2023 to 2025 and found that just 3.5% of accounts generate the bulk of price discovery, while the majority of participants fund this accuracy through losses.
The findings challenge the perception that prediction markets operate on the "wisdom of the crowd." Instead, the authors argue, their accuracy reflects the "wisdom of an informed minority"—market makers and skilled traders who earn outsized profits. On average, market maker accounts pocketed $11,830 each during the study period, while other informed traders collectively captured over 30% of total gains. The majority of participants, labeled as "unlucky losers," covered aggregate losses.
Prediction markets have become a hotbed of activity in the crypto sector, recording over $15 billion in monthly trading volume as of 2026. Platforms like Polymarket and Kalshi allow users to trade contracts on events ranging from elections to sports outcomes, offering a financial incentive to aggregate collective beliefs.
However, this rapid growth has drawn regulatory scrutiny. Concerns over insider trading are mounting, with critics arguing that the pseudonymous nature of these platforms makes them ripe for abuse. A recent case on April 26 involved a soldier allegedly using classified information to profit on a prediction market bet. Researchers noted that prediction markets face less oversight compared to securities markets, opening the door for private information to influence trading outcomes.
The study's findings highlight a potential ethical quandary: while the informed minority drives market efficiency, their gains come at the expense of less-informed participants. This dynamic raises questions about fairness, particularly as platforms gain traction among a broader user base. Regulatory pressures are likely to increase, with platforms potentially needing to adopt stricter rules to mitigate insider trading risks. For instance, some platforms have begun banning political candidates from betting on their own campaigns.
The study also underscores the profitability gap within prediction markets. Another analysis, released earlier this month, found that only 0.015% of traders on Polymarket achieved consistent profits of $5,000 or more over four consecutive months. These findings suggest that prediction markets, while lucrative for a select few, offer limited opportunities for the average user to turn a profit.
As prediction markets evolve, the pressure to address transparency and fairness will grow. Kalshi and Polymarket's recent plans to introduce perpetual contracts signal innovation, but they may also invite further regulatory oversight. With trading volumes soaring and insider trading concerns escalating, the next few years will likely define the long-term viability of these platforms.
For now, traders should approach prediction markets with caution, understanding that the odds may be tilted in favor of an informed minority who dominate price discovery and profitability.
